text: I am intrigued and alert as I stand in this modern, almost clinical space. The clean lines and glass partitions hint at a place dedicated to thought and innovation. As I move closer to the bold, colorful wall with "R+D" emblazoned on it, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. This seems to be a sanctuary devoted to research and the merging of human and technological intellect. Surrounded by displays and screens with snippets of text, I find my mind drawn to contemplation about the boundary between humans and machines, and my place amidst these evolving conversations.
